Operation 'users-profile' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Operation has no description. Added context about authentication requirement, what data is returned, and reference to the UserProfile schema for AI agent clarity on response structure.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the authenticated user's profile information including name, email, and account details. Requires bearer token authentication. Returns a UserProfile object containing user identification, contact information, and account metadata.
data.reasoning: Operation has no description. Added context about authentication requirement, what data is returned, and reference to the UserProfile schema for AI agent clarity on response structure.

message: Operation 'events-subscribe' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing description entirely. Added details about authentication, input requirements (EventSubscribeRequest), output (EventSubscription), and side effects (webhook callbacks for specific event types like conversation finished, summary created, todo items created) to help AI agents understand the subscription mechanism.

data.current_summary: Subscribes a client to an event
data.description_suggestion: Subscribes the authenticated client to receive notifications for a specified event type. Accepts an EventSubscribeRequest containing the event type and webhook URL. Returns an EventSubscription confirmation. After subscription, the client will receive webhook callbacks when the subscribed event occurs (e.g., conversation finished, summary created, todo items created).
data.reasoning: Missing description entirely. Added details about authentication, input requirements (EventSubscribeRequest), output (EventSubscription), and side effects (webhook callbacks for specific event types like conversation finished, summary created, todo items created) to help AI agents understand the subscription mechanism.

message: Operation 'events-unsubscribe' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing description and lacks input/output clarity. Added authentication context, clarified what input is needed to identify the subscription, specified the confirmation response, and explained the side effect (cessation of webhook callbacks).

data.current_summary: Unsubscribes a client from an event
data.description_suggestion: Unsubscribes the authenticated client from receiving notifications for a specified event type. Requires the event subscription identifier or event type in the request. Returns confirmation of successful unsubscription. After unsubscription, the client will no longer receive webhook callbacks for that event type.
data.reasoning: Missing description and lacks input/output clarity. Added authentication context, clarified what input is needed to identify the subscription, specified the confirmation response, and explained the side effect (cessation of webhook callbacks).

message: Operation 'events-sample' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing description and input/output details. Added context about the operation's purpose (understanding webhook structure), clarified the parameter requirement with examples, and explained that it returns sample payloads matching actual webhook callback structures.

data.current_summary: Returns sample data for an event
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves sample payload data for a specified event type to help clients understand the webhook callback structure. Accepts an event type parameter (e.g., 'conversation_finished', 'summary_created', 'todo_items_created'). Returns a sample event payload demonstrating the data structure and fields that will be sent in actual webhook callbacks for that event type.
data.reasoning: Missing description and input/output details. Added context about the operation's purpose (understanding webhook structure), clarified the parameter requirement with examples, and explained that it returns sample payloads matching actual webhook callback structures.

message: Operation 'post_/oauth2/authorize' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description mentions PKCE but lacks details about inputs (AuthorizeRequest), outputs (authorization code), and side effects (code expiration, client/URI binding). Enhanced to clarify the complete flow and what the returned code can be used for.

data.current_summary: Creates an authorization code for a client
data.current_description: This endpoint is used to initiate the OAuth2 authorizationCode flow with PKCE.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates the OAuth2 authorization code flow with PKCE support. Accepts an AuthorizeRequest containing client credentials, redirect URI, scopes, and PKCE challenge. Returns an authorization code that can be exchanged for access and refresh tokens at the /oauth2/token endpoint. The authorization code is short-lived and tied to the requesting client and specified redirect URI.
data.reasoning: Description mentions PKCE but lacks details about inputs (AuthorizeRequest), outputs (authorization code), and side effects (code expiration, client/URI binding). Enhanced to clarify the complete flow and what the returned code can be used for.

message: Operation 'post_/oauth2/token' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Description is incomplete regarding input types and output details. Added clarity about the two request types (AuthorizationCodeGrantRequest and RefreshTokenGrantRequest), specified the TokenResponse structure, and explained how the returned access token is used for API authentication.

data.current_summary: Exchanges an authorization code or refresh token for an access token
data.current_description: This endpoint is used to exchange an authorization code or refresh token for a new pair of access and refresh tokens.
data.description_suggestion: Exchanges an authorization code or refresh token for a new pair of access and refresh tokens. Accepts either an AuthorizationCodeGrantRequest (with authorization code and PKCE verifier) or RefreshTokenGrantRequest (with refresh token). Returns a TokenResponse containing access token, refresh token, token type, expiration time, and scope. Access tokens are used for API authentication via bearer token.
data.reasoning: Description is incomplete regarding input types and output details. Added clarity about the two request types (AuthorizationCodeGrantRequest and RefreshTokenGrantRequest), specified the TokenResponse structure, and explained how the returned access token is used for API authentication.
